calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and to C.C.P. 583.360 for failure to comply with C.C.P. 583.310. The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)
